title: Rituals
description: Rituals adds multiple small rituals which let you do some things in a more scenic way.
body:
Rituals

Rituals adds multiple small rituals which let you do some things in a more scenic way.

Currently implemented:
- Turn the Night to day by throwing an sunflower on an campfire
- Turn the Day to night by throwing a piece of charcoal on an soul_campfire
- relight campfires by throwing a piece of flint on them
- Ritual to clear the Weather (sponge on a campfire)
- Ritual to summon rain (wet sponge on a campfire)
- Ritual to summon a thunderstorm (channeling book on a soul/campfire)

- some Soundeffects
- Particle effects

Upcoming:
- summon some mobs through rituals
- more soundeffects
- maybe some animations
